    Index

    A M R S T W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    A

    addMessage(String) - Method in class secret_message.SecretMessage
    Procedure to save a new message

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class secret_message.ReadSecretMessage
    Main procedure
    usage : ReadSecretMessage fileName
    fileName It gives the path to the message encoded by WriteSecretMessage
    main(String[]) - Static method in class secret_message.WriteSecretMessage
    Main procedure
    usage : WriteSecretMessage fileName value1 value2 ...
    messages - Variable in class secret_message.SecretMessage
    An array of String corresponding to the user messages

    R

    ReadSecretMessage - Class in secret_message
    Class which is able to read an instance of a SecretMessage object from a binary file thanks to a (de)serialization process
    ReadSecretMessage() - Constructor for class secret_message.ReadSecretMessage
    Default constructor (only detailed for avoiding warning in documentation generation)

    S

    secret_message - package secret_message
    The package secret_message contains an exemple to:
    write an object into a file thanks to serialization restore an instance of an object from a binary file also thanks to serialization :-)
    SecretMessage - Class in secret_message
    Class which is able to save several messages and implements java.io.Serializable
    SecretMessage() - Constructor for class secret_message.SecretMessage
    Classical constructor by initialization
    serialVersionUID - Static variable in class secret_message.SecretMessage
    Indicate the current version of the class
    specialValue - Variable in class secret_message.SecretMessage
    A random int value in [0,1024[
    specialValueT - Variable in class secret_message.SecretMessage
    An other random int value in [0,1024[ which cannot be serialized due to the transient keyword

    T

    toString() - Method in class secret_message.SecretMessage
    Specialized version of toString function that prints the value of all the internal attributes.

    W

    WriteSecretMessage - Class in secret_message
    Class which is able to write an instance of a SecretMessage object thanks to a serialization process
    WriteSecretMessage() - Constructor for class secret_message.WriteSecretMessage
    Default constructor (only detailed for avoiding warning in documentation generation)
